title: The Triple Crown Champion That Was

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day following the Kikuka Sho, after Agnes
Tachyon declared her commitment to her senior
year challenges...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Appear live on TV as the Triple Crown champion?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We receive an offer to appear on a morning news
program.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it'll take only ten minutes, and it's being
held on campus. But most importantly... it'll be
broadcasted live.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, never mind. I'm just thinking out loud. Either
way, I'd be happy for us to appear on the
program!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Please welcome Agnes Tachyon, winner of the
Triple Crown, and her trainer,
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The race seems to have generated no small
amount of excitement, and I must admit, it was a
significant step forward for me as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, it's only one step. If anything, I
feel as if I've finally reached the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In other words... the Triple Crown was only the
first of my exploits!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean we can expect even greater leaps
forward in the future?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that a given? The potential we're aiming for
is still far off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If anything, now more than ever, there is research
to be done and races to be won!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Wow! I can't wait to watch your career unfold!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! By all means, allow me to observe the
activity of your amygdala.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
And your trainer as well, could you share a few
words regarding your outlook for the future?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the past year and a half, Agnes Tachyon has
spared no effort in the Twinkle Series (though I
wish she'd explain those efforts more often).

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, from here on...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, then, let's hear your plans for my senior
year races. I'm all ears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She made a promise to me. Which means, my
stance must remain the same!
choice_data_list: I will continue to believe in Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your passionate words! Well, you
sure have a lot on your shoulders, wouldn't you
say, Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. I'll take you to the very end.
Leave it to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've gotten a glimpse of the bond
between the two of you, let's have one final
round of applause!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait, wait, wait! I haven't said the most
important thing yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We didn't agree on any announcements
beforehand. Could it be about her next goal or
senior year plans? I wait with bated breath.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To all those watching this live, I hope you're
excited, because my trainer and I are now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Recruiting guinea... Ahem. Recruiting test
subjects!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More experiments are needed if we wish to
discover the limits of Umamusume potential. So
don't hesitate to join us!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Please contact my trainer with any inquiries. He
can be reached twenty-four hours a day, seven
days a week at...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Please contact my trainer with any inquiries. She
can be reached twenty-four hours a day, seven
days a week at...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before she can say anything more, I hurriedly
escort her out of the venue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But just like she said, the Triple Crown was only
the beginning. Our days pressing forward are far
from over.
